provenance.emitted_grid: CoreCoord(11, 10) largest observed; per-op grids below are copied from the emit
provenance.capture_schema: lossless per-layer/per-role templates for repeated emitted decoder ops; entries name layer variants when the emit differs
provenance.note: This is a decode emit, not a prefill emit. Grids/shard-core counts are verbatim from the emit's authoring device and MUST be legalized to the optimize target's real compute grid; only the intent ports as-is.

qkv_matmul.applies_to: ttnn_matmul_0 for layer 0, ttnn_matmul_156 for layer 31, and the repeated middle-layer qkv matmul role
qkv_matmul.program_config: MatmulMultiCoreReuseMultiCast1DProgramConfig(compute_with_storage_grid_size=CoreCoord(11, 9), in0_block_w=2, out_subblock_h=1, out_subblock_w=2, out_block_h=1, out_block_w=2, per_core_M=1, per_core_N=2, fuse_batch=True, fused_activation=None, mcast_in0=True, gather_in0=False, hop_cores=CoreRangeSet([]), num_global_cb_receivers=0, untilize_out=False)

qkv_weight.note: Layers 0..30 fuse [Q,V,K]; layer 31 reorders to [Q,K,V] in consteval.

o_proj_matmul.applies_to: ttnn_matmul_2 for layer 0 and repeated o_proj matmul role in decoder layers
o_proj_matmul.program_config: MatmulMultiCoreReuseMultiCast1DProgramConfig(compute_with_storage_grid_size=CoreCoord(11, 6), in0_block_w=8, out_subblock_h=1, out_subblock_w=2, out_block_h=1, out_block_w=2, per_core_M=1, per_core_N=2, fuse_batch=True, fused_activation=None, mcast_in0=True, gather_in0=False, hop_cores=CoreRangeSet([]), num_global_cb_receivers=0, untilize_out=False)

mlp_gate_up.applies_to: ttnn_matmul_3 gate_proj and ttnn_matmul_4 up_proj repeated by decoder layer
mlp_gate_up.program_config: gate_proj: MatmulMultiCoreReuseMultiCast1DProgramConfig(compute_with_storage_grid_size=ttnn.CoreCoord(11, 9), in0_block_w=2, out_subblock_h=1, out_subblock_w=5, out_block_h=1, out_block_w=5, per_core_M=1, per_core_N=5, fuse_batch=True, fused_activation=ttnn.UnaryWithParam(ttnn.UnaryOpType.SILU), mcast_in0=True, gather_in0=False, hop_cores=ttnn.CoreRangeSet([]), num_global_cb_receivers=0, untilize_out=False); up_proj: MatmulMultiCoreReuseMultiCast1DProgramConfig(compute_with_storage_grid_size=ttnn.CoreCoord(11, 9), in0_block_w=2, out_subblock_h=1, out_subblock_w=5, out_block_h=1, out_block_w=5, per_core_M=1, per_core_N=5, fuse_batch=True, fused_activation=None, mcast_in0=True, gather_in0=False, hop_cores=ttnn.CoreRangeSet([]), num_global_cb_receivers=0, untilize_out=False)

mlp_down.applies_to: ttnn_matmul_5 repeated by decoder layer after WIDTH_SHARDED [32,256] down-input relayout
mlp_down.program_config: MatmulMultiCoreReuseMultiCast1DProgramConfig(compute_with_storage_grid_size=ttnn.CoreCoord(11, 6), in0_block_w=8, out_subblock_h=1, out_subblock_w=2, out_block_h=1, out_block_w=2, per_core_M=1, per_core_N=2, fuse_batch=True, fused_activation=None, mcast_in0=True, gather_in0=False, hop_cores=ttnn.CoreRangeSet([]), num_global_cb_receivers=0, untilize_out=False)

lm_head.program_config: MatmulMultiCoreReuseMultiCast1DProgramConfig(compute_with_storage_grid_size=CoreCoord(11, 10), in0_block_w=2, out_subblock_h=1, out_subblock_w=1, out_block_h=1, out_block_w=37, per_core_M=1, per_core_N=37, fuse_batch=True, fused_activation=None, mcast_in0=True, gather_in0=False, hop_cores=CoreRangeSet([]), num_global_cb_receivers=0, untilize_out=False)
